productDisplayName: Doodle Kids Girl Washed Blue Skirt
description: Composition Washed blue denim skirt with a zipped and buttoned closure in the front, belt loops on the waist, two mock pockets on the front, two pockets at the back, embroidery on the front, snipped edges with a Hakuba frill at the bottom Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours in a delicate cycle Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry low Dry in shade Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Her cuteness level will be off the chart when you dress your little girl in this denim skirt from doodle. The floral embroidery adds to it a colourful touch. Team this with a girly top and sandals.
